# Evidence Docket Composer v34

Evidence Docket Composer is a browser-local public demonstration of the GoalOS proof-room idea.

It helps users understand that a public proof page is not a marketing page. It is a claim-bound evidence room containing a manifest, claims matrix, provenance, proof packets, verifier report, risk ledger, replay path, claim boundary, governed decision state, and Chronicle entry.

The page remains public-safe: no accounts, forms, cookies, analytics, wallet connection, token approval, transaction broadcast, external network request, persistent storage, or user data collection.
